textByHashes.b3c2c543daa72021c627b49b90bd682e0d1de208: What brings thee to our domain? It has been a long time since
textByHashes.f3c5e52f2988f4ef5d1c9821f5db534b340532de: We are a gestalt entity. We each have our own body, but our minds
textByHashes.1a89d00b6f12c59b1bb967cf0036a6eeddb2718a: Ok we're a mostly gestalt entity. We each have own body, but
textByHashes.7a72dec8932d370eb2f3029a01b9260286900742: This little one doth come blundering into our abode making demands, with no thought for
textByHashes.503c75ed5e399f60c6583f229768c33f87526e08: You are little in power compared to us.
textByHashes.f51209140a28f7cdeb8bd16fa5c5834090a600be: That's a shame because thou art annoyed already.
textByHashes.625552d3d52e8fe091662c68d47912e6c0b3cc20: You know thou art really not skilled at diplomacy.
textByHashes.3ec279975edf7f518aea123612d3ec20661033e1: Well we know ye mortals are always in a rush with
textByHashes.cb682fe36cb24d3b66a9826291e3119df45663bc: We are powerful spirits with direct contact to the great goddess Elidinis, we do not need to be bothered by the trifles of
textByHashes.996a597c8c0fbd680ca3efe1ee9b6511bf8831af: How unusual, that the one who would come unto us on this issue isn't even from Nardah. Yes, it was indeed we
textByHashes.9eddd6e7cd974c1e430cb15df30e64106f824bfd: No that also was our doing!
textByHashes.a9a0d1b756405993e698f4cf7d0d29c50b24260c: He came preaching the ways of Saradomin. Which is all well and good, but he also did turneth them from the path of the desert gods, especially Elidinis. Elidinis is happy to share the worship of followers, indeed Elidinis
textByHashes.e46bb6fe998452f7923947325d7846dd4fb8fd68: was allied with Saradomin many ages past. Saradominist mages even gave us those golems you met as a diplomatic gesture, so you can see we have been on good terms. However this is an outrage.
textByHashes.fe0bb2c74625c9ed24d7cd17e1debd67bd09a6f7: That seems to be something which happens when we get emotional
textByHashes.6b08947278971f305c6699926197443629ebfb7e: to the ground. Most of the human citizens perished. Nardarine had the wisdom to escape into the desert before the fighting got really serious and thus survived. However she found herself wandering lost and alone in
textByHashes.dc84c2a927acaf69cd9a4a97fee20a391bb41d3b: the wars of the gods for they have caused me so much hardship already, I wish only for a quiet life somewhere'. Elidinis replied 'I will grant this unto thee on the condition that thou swearest to forever pay fealty and
textByHashes.dc8c6b25527d494a705ac7a4b53697d6f9e6e302: a spring of water appear at Nardarines feet and brought stone from below the sand so that she
textByHashes.1e497f2c0b0cc4c8dff3637055f08b33d5e73a35: of her days in the peacefulness that she craved. The oath was passed down the generations for many ages, but now seemeth to be forgotten. Now maybe thou canst see why we are not best pleased.
textByHashes.662c1464ff3eacba8a975399e917a7590d628363: I do not know. The Saradominist priest persuaded the people of Nardah to throw away a statuette of Elidinis which was in the temple. As long as they do not have that image of Elidinis to pray to, then we must consider
textByHashes.cb3315158fd9f692e9ee644bb47a0c5756b1c3f1: them turned away from her and the curse shalt stand.
textByHashes.00111f037e6b5f2be2326a9b0345f5991f79291c: We are the spirits of the river Elid, many ages ago we used to be mindless wandering spirits, with little mind or purpose, we were here even in the first age. Then great Elidinis came to the desert and bound us to her
textByHashes.62c63a9eb010ba3cbbe8522af101a81663851ec4: Elidinis is one of a group of gods, known as the Menaphite Pantheon. She is the wife of their leader Tumeken. She is the Menaphite goddess of growth and fertility, and goddess of the river.
textByHashes.916629843282faa4c3d569fa0ae2f7983c1c2c47: : As long as they do not have their statuette of Elidinis to pray to, then we
textByHashes.da9cd10cb31e91ccf3f7b136a32ddbabf55f74bc: We noticed and removed the curse. Hopefully they
textByHashes.caa16f7ff46030ede1381619a85756fcd1e636f8: Elidinis is one of a group of gods, known as the Menaphite Pantheon. She is wife of their leader Tumeken. She is the Menaphite goddess of growth and fertility and goddess of the river.
